calendar.matters:
Motion For Order To File Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Andrew Filipek 415-279-8058 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is not contested/Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANDREW FILIPEK's Motion For Order To File Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

Plaintiff Andrew Filipek's motion for order to file application for and renewal of judgment nunc pro tunc is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court will sign the proposed order previously submitted by Mr. Filipek.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Plaintiff'S Notice For Order To File Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Feb-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF ANDREW FILIPEK'S Notice For Order To File Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar. Moving party failed to lodge courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion For Order To File Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Nov-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ANDREW FILIPEK'S Motion For Order To File Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Edward N. Thomson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Andrew D. Filipek, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Brian Dill.
Default was entered against defendant on July 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed December 29, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Andrew D. Filipek, and against the Defaulted Defendant Brian Dill as follows:

Damages/Principal - $80,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $40,328.80.
Costs - $621.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $120,949.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
